id: get-pledge-and-payment-history-for-a-family-finance-role-required

description: "Results are filtered by the current user's ShowSince date and ShowPayments/ShowPledges preferences."
sidebar_label: "Get pledge and payment history for a family (Finance role required)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get pledge and payment history for a family (Finance role required)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/payments/family/{familyId}/list"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Results are filtered by the current user's ShowSince date and ShowPayments/ShowPledges preferences.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
